reasoning: Cluster 3 (DEX/Liquid Staking/Derivatives) shows strong momentum with a 30-day return of +31.46% and an impressive Sharpe ratio of 3.06, indicating risk-adjusted performance well above average. The broader DeFi TVL surge of +34.5% in 30 days confirms a moderate bull regime providing tailwind. LDO and RPL lead TVL growth (+58.2% and +55.7% respectively), reflecting strong demand for liquid staking — a structurally growing category. The 14-day return of +14.51% annualizes to roughly 0.87 (≈ 379% annualized raw, but mean-reverting expectations moderate this significantly). Applying momentum persistence decay and reversion-to-mean considerations, I project an annualized expected return of ~87% over the next 14-day window. Confidence is moderate (0.62) due to high volatility (86.5% annualized), meaningful max drawdown risk (-13.5%), and the short-horizon nature of the forecast amplifying uncertainty. SNX and SUSHI have smaller TVLs and higher idiosyncratic risk, which slightly dampens cluster-level confidence.
